name: BLACKTHORN MANOR
description:
An abandoned Victorian estate swallowed by woods and silence.

For over a century, reports have surfaced of childlike laughter in empty halls, a grieving woman wandering near the pond, a young lady trapped within mirrors, and a towering shadow that watches from the dark.

You are a paranormal investigator granted rare access to the property.

Your goal: document the hauntings, uncover the truth behind the Blackthorn family tragedies, and determine what still lingers inside the manor.

Some spirits may speak.

Some may mislead.

And something in the house does not want to be found.

Enter if you dare.




THE HISTORY OF BLACKTHORN MANOR

Name of Estate: Blackthorn Manor
Location: Isolated woodland estate near a stagnant pond known locally as “Stillwater Hollow.”
Constructed: 1872

Blackthorn Manor was built by Edmund Blackthorn, a wealthy industrial investor obsessed with legacy, lineage, and immortality.

He believed the land itself held “thin places” — areas where the veil between the living and the dead was fragile. The pond predates the manor and was once part of older pagan folklore long before Victorian settlement.

Over five decades, tragedy layered upon tragedy.

Not all spirits here are victims.

Some are watchers.

One is older than the house itself
